transcript:
Speaker A: ಆಂಟಿ, ಒಂದು kg ಮೆಣಸಿನಕಾಯಿ ಎಷ್ಟು? [Aunty, how much is one kg of chillies?]
Speaker B: It's ₹25 per kilo, sir. If you take 2 kilos, it's ₹40. You can pay via UPI.
Speaker A: ಆಂಟಿ, ನೀವು ಇಷ್ಟು ಚೆನ್ನಾಗಿ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಹೇಗೆ ಮಾತಾಡ್ತೀರಾ? [Aunty, how do you speak English so well?]
Speaker B: It is because of MySivi, sir.
Speaker A: MySivi? ಅದು ಏನು? [MySivi? What is that?]
Speaker B: ಹೌದು sir, ಈ app ಅಲ್ಲಿ ಇರೋ AI Teacher ನಮಗೆ daily step by step process ಮೂಲಕ ಕನ್ನಡದಿಂದಲೇ English ಕಲಿಸುತ್ತೆ. ದಿನಕ್ಕೆ 15-20 minutes ಕೊಟ್ಟರೆ ಸಾಕು sir, within 30 days ನಮ್ಮ English ಸಕ್ಕತ್ತಾಗಿ improve ಆಗುತ್ತೆ. [Yes sir, the AI Teacher in this app teaches us English from Kannada through a daily step-by-step process. Just 15-20 minutes a day is enough sir, within 30 days our English will improve amazingly.]
Speaker A: ಆದ್ರೆ ಅದು ತುಂಬಾ costly ಆಗಿರಬೇಕಲ್ವಾ? ಹೇಗೆ manage ಮಾಡಿದ್ರಿ? [But that must be very costly, right? How did you manage?]
Speaker B: ಏನಿಲ್ಲ sir, ನೀವು ಕೊಡೋ ಮೆಣಸಿನಕಾಯಿ rate ಗಿಂತ ಕಮ್ಮಿ. ಬರಿ 1 rupee trial ಅಲ್ಲಿ app ಪೂರ್ಣವಾಗಿ use ಮಾಡಬಹುದು. [Nothing sir, it's less than the rate of the chillies you buy. You can use the app fully in just a 1 rupee trial.]
Speaker A: Super ಆಂಟಿ, ಹಾಗಾದ್ರೆ ನಾನು ಈಗಲೇ MySivi app install ಮಾಡ್ಕೊಳ್ತೀನಿ. [Super Aunty, then I will install the MySivi app right now.]
Speaker B: MySivi app install ಮಾಡ್ಕೊಳ್ಳಿ, ನಿಮ್ಮ English journey ಅನ್ನ ಈಗಲೇ ಶುರು ಮಾಡಿ. [Install MySivi app, start your English journey right now.]
Speaker C: Click on install now and download MySivi app.
on_screen_text:
Aunty
it's ₹25 per kilo, sir. If you take 2 kilos, it's ₹40. You can pay via UPI.
MySivi
15-20 MINUTES
30 Days
1 RUPEE
MySivi App
MySivi English speaking app Install Now
summary: A customer is amazed by a vegetable vendor's fluent English. She credits her skills to the MySivi app, which teaches English from Kannada in 15-20 minutes daily and offers a 1 Rupee trial, inspiring him to download it.
